name: CABIO Biotech(Wuhan) Co., Ltd.
summary: CABIO Biotech(Wuhan) Co., Ltd. is a China-based biotechnology company focused on the research, development, production, and sales of microbial fermentation products. Their products include ARA (arachidonic acid), DHA (docosahexaenoic acid), and other functional lipids used in food, infant formula, and dietary supplements. The company is headquartered in Wuhan, China.
